summary: TWO_COLUMN: Moore-Penrose pseudoinverse for 2×3 A under-determined Ax=b. LEFT axonometric 3D axes with RED x_LS=A^+ b and YELLOW solution line x(t)=x_LS+t·n where n spans ker A. ValueTracker t_tr sweeps t through {1.5, -1.5, 0.8, -0.8, 0}. always_redraw YELLOW dot on line. RIGHT has live t, ‖x(t)‖ (minimized at t=0), ‖Ax-b‖ (always 0).
